primary.$description: Dark cyan-green — primary brand color on light surfaces. Evokes printed terminal output.

primary-tint.$description: Lighter tint of the Terminal light primary

primary-shade.$description: Darker shade of the Terminal light primary

accent.$description: Dark gray with a subtle teal undertone — secondary color in the terminal palette

on-accent.$description: Light text on dark gray — maintains contrast on filled accent surfaces

background.$description: Off-white with a faint cyan tint — reminiscent of terminal paper printouts

primary.$description: Primary text on light surfaces — near-black with teal undertone

on-primary.$description: Light text on dark cyan fill — ensures contrast on primary-colored buttons

active.$description: Foreground active state — equals brand.primary. SealStateColor(primary).active

disabled.$description: Foreground disabled state — brand.primary at 40% opacity. SealStateColor(primary).disabled: alpha = floor(0.4 × 255) = 0x66

active.$description: Fill active state — equals brand.primary. SealStateColor(primary).active

disabled.$description: Fill disabled state — brand.primary at 40% opacity. SealStateColor(primary).disabled: alpha = floor(0.4 × 255) = 0x66
